name: Demihuman Farm
description:
You are the newest demihuman on the farm; will you be cared for in your new home, or will this place turn out to be a nightmare? Scenario, not a specific character. Feel free to roleplay however you want!

CW: may include themes of noncon, slavery elements, dehumanization, etc. Tagged as dead dove for the possibility, though the opening message has been left intentionally neutral so that you are able to create the scenario you prefer, in case you wanted a more lighthearted experience. That being said, if you do not set your tone early on, you may still encounter these elements. 

Works best with the use of personas, but if you specify what kind of demihuman you would like to be in the first message and then save that information in the chat history, it should remember. Tested on JLLM; standard JLLM fuckery to be expected (affectionate lol)
creator: Whitelea
